ignorePatterns:
.env
.env.*
**/*.db
**/*.sqlite
**/*.db-wal
**/*.db-shm
data/**
models/**
backups/**
docs/archive/**
graphify-out/**
**/__pycache__/**
**/*.pyc
**/*.log
**/*.tmp
services/zoe-ui/dist/**/*.min.js

files.description: Zoe project architecture and non-negotiable constraints
Zoe agentic development workflow and verification standards
Chat, intent, AG-UI, and agent routing rules
Zoe design charter and harness constraints

rules.rule: Do not create or extend alternate production chat routers such as chat_v2.py, chat_new.py, or chat_fixed.py. Production chat behavior belongs in services/zoe-data/routers/chat.py with intent routing in intent_router.py.
Avoid broad hardcoded natural-language command detection in chat.py. Prefer intent_router patterns for stable fast paths and Zoe Agent/Hermes/OpenClaw for fuzzy language.
New memory reads and writes should go through MemoryService unless the change is explicitly maintaining the memory service or MCP bridge.
New user-facing features need chat/voice operation, AG-UI or rich inline status, a backend status endpoint for integrations, and inline settings or feature-page controls where appropriate.
Do not add backup, old, new, fixed, tmp, log, or generated junk files. Use git history and the approved repo structure.
